name: 序列索引与切片混淆
description: Confuses zero-based indexing, half-open slices, negative indices, or string/list immutability.
remediation_strategy: Use short string and list traces that require index, slice, and mutation reasoning.

name: 赋值与可变性混淆
description: Treats assignment as copying values or misses how mutable list aliases share state.
remediation_strategy: Contrast rebinding with mutating the object through two references.

name: 控制流边界错误
description: Misreads if/elif/else branches, range stop values, loop else behavior, break, or continue.
remediation_strategy: Ask the learner to enumerate executed lines and loop values explicitly.

name: 函数参数语义混淆
description: Confuses default argument evaluation, keyword arguments, unpacking, or return values.
remediation_strategy: Use small function calls that isolate one argument binding rule at a time.

name: 列表操作返回值混淆
description: Confuses in-place list methods with expressions that create new lists.
remediation_strategy: Compare append/sort side effects with comprehensions and slicing.

name: 集合与映射语义混淆
description: Misunderstands tuples, sets, dictionaries, membership, iteration order, or dictionary lookup.
remediation_strategy: Use collection-specific examples and ask which operation is supported.

name: 导入与命名空间混淆
description: Confuses module objects, imported names, attribute access, dir(), search paths, or package imports.
remediation_strategy: Trace where a name lives after each import form and how Python resolves modules.

name: 格式化与文件操作混淆
description: Misuses f-strings, format specifiers, str()/repr(), file modes, context managers, or json serialization.
remediation_strategy: Separate display formatting from data representation and file lifecycle.

name: 异常流程混淆
description: Confuses syntax errors with runtime exceptions or misreads try/except/else/finally execution order.
remediation_strategy: Ask for an execution trace through normal and exceptional paths.

name: 抛出与自定义异常混淆
description: Misuses raise, exception chaining, or custom exception class design.
remediation_strategy: Use minimal exception classes and explicit raise/catch examples.

name: 命名空间与作用域混淆
description: Confuses local, global, nonlocal, class, and instance namespaces.
remediation_strategy: Trace name lookup from local scope outward and distinguish class body from methods.

name: 类对象与实例对象混淆
description: Confuses class attributes, instance attributes, self, method binding, or inheritance lookup.
remediation_strategy: Compare attribute lookup on the class and on two separate instances.
